name: community-hps-vaporwave
title: Vaporwave
description: Vaporwave deck theme: a deep-purple-to-magenta sunset sky (#1a0938 → #e85d9c) with a cyan glow ellipse rising from the horizon, pink→purple→cyan gradient-clipped display type, frosted-glass cards with glowing 4px gradient dividers, a scanline sun mark, and Space Grotesk throughout. A E S T H E T I C. Single-file HTML deck with keyboard navigation and #/N hash routing. Based on lewislulu/html-ppt-skill vaporwave (assets/themes/vaporwave.css + templates/deck.html).

description_i18n.en: Vaporwave deck theme: a deep-purple-to-magenta sunset sky (#1a0938 → #e85d9c) with a cyan glow ellipse rising from the horizon, pink→purple→cyan gradient-clipped display type, frosted-glass cards with glowing 4px gradient dividers, a scanline sun mark, and Space Grotesk throughout. A E S T H E T I C. Single-file HTML deck with keyboard navigation and #/N hash routing. Based on lewislulu/html-ppt-skill vaporwave (assets/themes/vaporwave.css + templates/deck.html).
description_i18n.zh-CN: 「蒸汽波美学」幻灯片主题：深紫→品红落日垂直渐变天空（#1a0938 → #e85d9c）+ 地平线升起的青色光晕椭圆，H1 粉→紫→青渐变裁切字，毛玻璃卡片 + 4px 发光渐变分隔线，扫描线太阳标记，全程 Space Grotesk。A E S T H E T I C。零依赖单文件 HTML，键盘翻页 + #/N 哈希路由。移植自 lewislulu/html-ppt-skill 的 vaporwave 主题。

query.en: Create a Vaporwave deck about {{topic}} for {{audience}} ({{slideCount}}, {{density}}): a retro-sunset presentation in the locked vaporwave theme from lewislulu/html-ppt-skill. Output one self-contained single-file HTML deck with zero dependencies — all CSS/JS inline, no build step, no external JS libraries, no CDN scripts; only Google Fonts @import may be used (Space Grotesk, Inter, Noto Sans SC, JetBrains Mono). THEME IS LOCKED — reproduce exactly: (a) Tokens: --bg:#1a0938; --bg-soft:#261050; --surface:rgba(255,255,255,.06); --surface-2:rgba(255,255,255,.1); --border:rgba(255,110,199,.28); --border-strong:rgba(0,245,255,.5); --text-1:#fdf0ff; --text-2:#d4a8e8; --text-3:#8a6ba8; --accent:#ff6ec7; --accent-2:#00f5ff; --accent-3:#ffd166; --good:#3ddc97; --warn:#ffd166; --bad:#ff5c8a; --grad:linear-gradient(135deg,#ff6ec7 0%,#c94fff 35%,#00f5ff 100%); --grad-soft:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,110,199,.25),rgba(0,245,255,.25)); --radius:18px; --radius-sm:10px; --radius-lg:28px; --shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(255,110,199,.2),0 0 1px rgba(0,245,255,.6); --shadow-lg:0 30px 80px rgba(255,110,199,.3),0 0 2px rgba(0,245,255,.8); fonts 'Space Grotesk' display+body, 'JetBrains Mono' mono; easing cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1). Slides reference tokens only — never hard-code other hues. (b) Signature sky on body, shared by every slide (.deck and .slide stay transparent): radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 80%,rgba(0,245,255,.3),transparent 60%) layered OVER linear-gradient(180deg,#1a0938 0%,#3a0f5c 45%,#7a1f6b 85%,#e85d9c 100%). (c) Signature devices: .h1 and key numerals clip --grad into the glyphs (pink→purple→cyan gradient text); frosted-glass .card (rgba surface + backdrop-filter:blur(18px) + pink rgba border + cyan-edged shadow); .divider-accent 4px × 120px gradient bar with box-shadow:0 0 20px var(--accent); the inline-SVG scanline sun mark (yellow→pink→purple circle with horizontal stripe mask, magenta glow) on cover and closer; outlined cyan -webkit-text-stroke section numerals with glow plus an optional cyan perspective-grid SVG on divider slides only; .aesthetic mono eyebrows with letter-spacing:.6em (A E S T H E T I C). (d) Slide system: each page is <section class="slide" data-title="..."> inside <div class="deck" id="deck"> — a horizontal scroll-snap strip, each slide exactly 100vw×100vh (flex:0 0 100vw), 16:9 / 1280×720 baseline with clamp() type scales, padding 72px 96px, one screen per slide with no internal scrolling; keep the fixed chrome (.deck-header with theme chip, .deck-footer with N / total counter, glowing gradient .progress-bar). (e) Runtime (keep the seed script verbatim): arrows/Space/PageUp/PageDown/Home/End navigate, T cycles the themes array, #/N hash routing with history.replaceState in try/catch, dual capture-phase key listeners deduped by Event identity, scroll sync, body auto-focus. (f) Motion restraint: at most one hero entrance (anim-rise-in) plus one anim-stagger-list per slide. (g) Compose pages from the upstream 31-layout catalog — cover → toc → (section-divider → 2-4 content pages) × N → thanks; the seed demonstrates cover, toc, section-divider, two-column, kpi-grid, stat-highlight, chart-bar, process-steps, big-quote, thanks. Charts are pure CSS/SVG (the seed's gradient .bar-chart is the reference) — no Chart.js/mermaid; icons are inline SVG; no external images. Real content with no lorem ipsum; 1-3 sentences of speaker notes per slide in a hidden .notes div. Start from the example.html seed shipped in this plugin: keep its token sheet, base/slide CSS, deck chrome, and the entire runtime script verbatim; replace only the slide content. Do not introduce any color or font outside this specification and do not redesign the theme.
query.zh-CN: 用「蒸汽波美学 Vaporwave」主题为 {{audience}} 创作一套关于 {{topic}} 的演示（{{slideCount}}，{{density}}）：深紫→品红落日渐变天空 + 青色光晕椭圆铺满全场，H1 粉→紫→青渐变裁切字，毛玻璃卡片 + 4px 发光渐变分隔线，扫描线太阳标记，全程 Space Grotesk。零依赖单文件 HTML：横向 scroll-snap 幻灯片骨架（100vw×100vh 一屏一页）、键盘翻页 + T 换肤 + #/N 哈希路由、图表纯 CSS/SVG 重建、图标内联 SVG。从插件内 example.html 种子出发：完整保留 token 表、基础样式、页面骨架和运行时脚本，只替换幻灯片内容；真实内容不用 lorem ipsum，每页在隐藏 .notes 里写 1-3 句演讲备注；禁止引入规格之外的颜色和字体。完整硬性规格以英文 prompt 为准。

exampleOutputs.title: MALLWAVE FM night broadcast — Vaporwave deck

inputs.label: Topic

inputs.label: Audience
inputs.placeholder: A creative team, a community, meetup attendees...
